insights.title: Organic traffic increased 17% compared with last week
insights.description: Total clicks grew from 1,068 to 1,247, driven by improved rankings for decision intelligence queries.

insights.title: Decision Systems became the fastest growing category
insights.description: With 3 new articles and 4 internal links, Decision Systems now matches AI Engineering in total content.

insights.title: Article 'Buku Saku Pengambilan Keputusan' became the highest impression page
insights.description: This article generated 2,340 impressions with a 6.7% CTR, outperforming all other pages in the garden.

insights.title: CTR dropped despite increasing impressions
insights.description: While impressions grew 14.4%, CTR only improved marginally from 6.46% to 6.59%. Consider optimizing meta descriptions.

insights.title: Returning users grew by 16%
insights.description: 892 returning users visited the garden, up from 768 in the previous period. Audience loyalty is improving.

insights.title: 5 consecutive days of commits
insights.description: Active publishing streak is underway with 11 commits in the last 30 days, focused on Decision Systems content.

insights.title: Knowledge Extraction Engine became the most internally linked article
insights.description: With 8 internal links, this article serves as a hub connecting AI Engineering to Decision Systems content.

insights.title: Mobile engagement time is 34% lower than desktop
insights.description: Mobile users average 124 seconds vs 187 seconds on desktop. Consider improving mobile reading experience.
